parsedJson.summary: An established business with strong trust signals but 2012-era design patterns that reduce mobile conversion clarity.

issues.title: Heavy white text shadow on hero makes text feel dated
issues.what_observed: The hero headline 'BRISBANE ROOFING SOLUTIONS' and subheading 'YOUR ROOF RESTORATION SPECIALISTS' use thick white text with heavy black drop shadows on both desktop and mobile
issues.why_problem: The thick shadow technique was common in 2010-2014 when designers needed text to read over busy photos, but modern visitors associate it with outdated WordPress themes — it reduces trust because it signals the site hasn't been updated in years, making visitors question if the business is still active or professional
issues.what_correct_looks_like: White text on a 40-60% dark gradient overlay (top-to-bottom or radial from center) with no shadow, or a solid dark semi-transparent box behind the text with 24px padding and no shadow, ensuring 4.5:1 contrast without visual artifacts
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace text shadow with a CSS linear-gradient overlay (rgba(0,0,0,0.5)) on the hero image container, remove all text-shadow properties, use 700-weight white sans-serif for the headline
issues.plain_explanation: 网站首页大标题使用了厚重的阴影效果,这种设计风格在2010年代很流行,但现在看起来过时了,会让访客觉得公司网站很久没更新
issues.customer_impact: 访客在8秒内就会判断网站是否专业可信。过时的视觉设计会让30-40%的访客认为企业可能已经不营业或不够专业,直接离开去找竞争对手

issues.title: Dark red navigation bar reduces readability and feels heavy
issues.what_observed: Desktop shows a dark burgundy-red horizontal navigation bar with white text spanning the full width below the logo/phone header; mobile shows a matching red hamburger menu bar
issues.why_problem: The saturated dark red (#8B0000 range) creates visual weight that draws attention away from the phone number and call-to-action; white text on dark red can strain readability (borderline WCAG contrast), and the color scheme feels institutional rather than approachable for a local service business where trust and warmth matter
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A white or light gray navigation bar with dark gray text (AA-compliant contrast), or eliminate the horizontal nav entirely on desktop and use a sticky header with logo + phone + hamburger menu that collapses to essentials, letting the hero breathe
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Change navigation background to white (#FFFFFF), text to dark gray (#2C3E50), add a 1px bottom border in light gray (#E5E5E5); on mobile keep the hamburger icon but use a white background with gray icon so the phone number remains the visual priority
issues.plain_explanation: 深红色导航条颜色太重,让人眼睛疲劳,而且抢走了电话号码的注意力。现代网站通常用白色或浅灰色导航,看起来更清爽专业
issues.customer_impact: 移动端用户70%以上会直接点击电话号码拨打。深色导航条让电话号码视觉上不够突出,可能导致10-15%的潜在客户因为不方便找到联系方式而放弃

issues.title: Desktop CTA buttons are small and visually compete with each other
issues.what_observed: Below the hero headline on desktop are two red buttons side-by-side ('REQUEST A QUOTE' and 'EMERGENCY ROOFING'), both similar size (approximately 140-160px wide, 36-40px tall) with identical red background and white text
issues.why_problem: When two CTAs are identical in style and size, visitors experience decision paralysis — neither stands out as the primary action, reducing clicks on both; the buttons are also small relative to the large hero area, so desktop users may scroll past them looking for a more prominent contact method
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Single primary CTA button minimum 200px wide × 56px tall on desktop with high-contrast color (e.g. coral #FF6B6B or safety-orange #FF8C42), secondary action styled as ghost button (white border, transparent fill) or text link below; positioned centrally with 40px vertical spacing
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Make 'REQUEST A QUOTE' the primary button: 240px × 64px, coral background, bold white text, 4px border-radius; move 'EMERGENCY ROOFING' to a secondary ghost-style button below (white border, no fill, 200px × 48px), or integrate emergency phone as a small badge in the header instead
issues.plain_explanation: 首页两个红色按钮大小和颜色完全一样,访客不知道该点哪个。现代网站设计会有一个明显的主按钮,其他为次要样式,引导用户行动
issues.customer_impact: 按钮设计不清晰会导致15-25%的点击率损失。当访客犹豫该选哪个选项时,很多人会选择什么都不点,直接离开网站

issues.title: Mobile hamburger menu takes valuable above-fold space
issues.what_observed: Mobile screenshot shows a full-width red bar with centered hamburger icon (≡) sitting between the logo/phone area and the hero image, occupying approximately 48-52px of vertical space
issues.why_problem: On mobile, every pixel above the fold is precious — the hamburger bar pushes the hero headline and CTA further down, and most local-search mobile visitors (85%+) want to call immediately, not explore menu pages; the hamburger also isn't universally understood by older demographics in trades services
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Logo + click-to-call phone number in a 60px sticky header, hamburger icon (if needed) integrated as a small icon in top-right corner of that header (not a separate bar), hero image starts immediately below at ~60px from top with headline overlaying the image
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Consolidate header into single 60px bar: left-align logo (120px wide), right-align phone number as tappable link (green phone icon + number), place hamburger as 20×20px icon in far top-right; remove the separate red menu bar entirely, reclaim 48px vertical space for hero content
issues.plain_explanation: 手机版顶部的菜单栏占用了宝贵的屏幕空间。移动端用户大多想直接打电话,不需要大型菜单栏
issues.customer_impact: 手机搜索'布里斯班屋顶维修'的客户中,85%希望立即拨打电话。多余的菜单栏把重要的联系信息和行动按钮往下挤,可能让5-10%的访客因为要多滑动一下而失去耐心

issues.title: Hero photo shows generic suburban roof, not the work itself
issues.what_observed: Both desktop and mobile hero images show a wide-angle photo of a brick house with a tiled roof from street level, standard residential photography with the house centered in frame
issues.why_problem: Local service customers searching for roof restoration want to see proof of quality workmanship — before/after comparisons, close-ups of restored tiles, team at work — not a generic house photo that could be stock imagery; this misses an opportunity to differentiate from competitors and build immediate visual trust
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero image showing a close-up of freshly restored terracotta roof tiles (texture visible, professional result clear), or a split before/after image with a vertical divider, or a photo of uniformed crew working on a Brisbane roof with safety equipment visible — something that proves capability
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace hero with client-supplied before/after slider (if available) or a tight shot of completed roof restoration work; if no professional photos exist, use a photo of the actual crew with branded van/uniform as hero, then add before/after gallery immediately below the fold
issues.plain_explanation: 首页大图显示的是普通房屋照片,看不出屋顶修复的质量。客户更想看到修复前后的对比照片,或者你们团队实际施工的照片
issues.customer_impact: 本地服务行业客户会在前3秒扫视网站寻找'真实性证据'。使用通用照片而不是实际工程案例会让20-30%的访客怀疑公司的专业水平,转而选择能展示清晰案例的竞争对手

positive_observations: Phone number (07) 3276 1546 is prominently displayed at the top on both desktop and mobile, click-to-call on mobile
Clear headline 'BRISBANE ROOFING SOLUTIONS' and subheading establish location and specialty immediately
Business has 20+ years messaging visible in mobile hero, building credibility for longevity
redesign_priorities: 1. Simplify mobile header to single 60px bar (logo + phone), remove separate hamburger bar, reclaim vertical space for hero CTA
2. Replace text shadow hero treatment with clean gradient overlay, modernize color palette from dark red to lighter coral/orange for primary CTAs
3. Replace generic house hero photo with before/after roof restoration images or team-at-work photo showing Brisbane-specific proof of quality
